# Diego Scarpati — Senior Fullstack Developer

## About
Diego Scarpati is a Senior Fullstack Developer based in Sydney, Australia (Northern Beaches).
He specialises in building production-grade web applications, landing pages, and Web3 products
for Australian businesses and startups.

Background: Former senior accountant at EY before transitioning to software engineering.
This background informs a precision-driven, deadline-focused approach to engineering.

Contact: diegoscarpati13@gmail.com
WhatsApp: +61 499 404 825
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/diego-scarpati/
GitHub: https://github.com/diego-scarpati

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Python, Express
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL), AWS
- Web3: Solidity, EVM-compatible chains, Hardhat

## Services & Pricing

### Landing Page
Starting from $800 AUD | Timeline: 1–2 weeks
Custom-designed, mobile-first, SEO-optimised landing page. Design, dev, and deploy included.

### Web App
Starting from $3,000 AUD | Timeline: 4–8 weeks
Full-stack web application with auth, database, and APIs. Built on Next.js + Supabase.

### Web3 / Smart Contract
Starting from $2,000 AUD | Timeline: 3–6 weeks
EVM-compatible Solidity smart contracts with DApp frontend. Includes testing and deployment.

### MVP Build
Starting from $5,000 AUD | Timeline: 6–12 weeks
End-to-end product from discovery to deployed MVP with CI/CD.

### Starter Retainer
$1,500 AUD/month | 20 hours/month
Ongoing development support: feature builds, bug fixes, weekly updates.

### Growth Retainer
$2,500 AUD/month | 40 hours/month
Dedicated engineering capacity with architecture advisory and same-day response.

## How to Hire
Submit a project brief at: https://diegoscarpati.dev/#contact
All inquiries are responded to within 24 hours.
